Browser & TZ Detection Menu Web Theme Picker
Default URL Feature Onboarding Notifications Quick Links User Onboarding Visual Indicator
Browser Storage DateTime Picker Request & URI ViewModelBase
Action Button Manager Currency Picker File Template Editor Repeater Table Plugin Template Editor Treeview Wizard Form

Get Started — Develop

CDN Files

231 files across 42 libraries, served from the Voyadores CDN. Copy any URL to reference it directly in your project.

Base URL https://cdn.voyadores.com/content

All files follow the pattern: https://cdn.voyadores.com/content/path/to/file.ext

Foundation

Bootstrap Theme

Voyadores-branded Bootstrap 5 theme CSS and JS bundle.

5
css bootstrap.voyadores.theme.css /css/bootstrap/
css bootstrap.voyadores.theme.min.css /css/bootstrap/
js bootstrap.bundle.min.js /js/bootstrap/
js bootstrap.min.js /js/bootstrap/
js bootstrap.esm.min.js /js/bootstrap/

Voyadores Icon Font

Icon font stylesheet and ligature support script.

4
css voyadores-icon.css /fonts/Voyadores-Icon/
css voyadores-icon.min.css /fonts/Voyadores-Icon/
js liga.js /fonts/Voyadores-Icon/
js liga.min.js /fonts/Voyadores-Icon/

Fonts

Lexend and system typeface @font-face declarations.

3
css fonts.css /fonts/
css fonts.min.css /fonts/
css fonts.css /fonts/Lexend/

Voyadores Components

Table

Data table with sorting, filtering, pagination, and row animations.

22
css table-2-2-1.css /css/table/
css table-2-2-1.min.css /css/table/

css table-2-1-1.min.css /css/table/

Action Button Manager

State-aware responsive toolbar button manager with permission control.

2
js action-button-manager.js /js/action-button-manager/
js action-button-manager.min.js /js/action-button-manager/

Form Validation

Client-side form validation with Voyadores-styled error messages.

4
css form-validation.css /css/form-validation/
css form-validation.min.css /css/form-validation/
js form-validation-1.0.0.js /js/form-validation/
js form-validation-1.0.0.min.js /js/form-validation/

Template Editor

Multi-section form template builder, viewer, and dual-role reviewer.

10
css template-editor.css /css/template-editor/
js model.js /js/template-editor/
js viewModel.js /js/template-editor/
js commands.js /js/template-editor/
js utils.js /js/template-editor/
js template-builder.js /js/template-editor/
js template-viewer.js /js/template-editor/
js template-reviewer.js /js/template-editor/

js sortable.min.js /js/template-editor/vendor/

File Template Editor

WYSIWYG + code editor for HTML and ASP.NET Razor CSHTML templates.

2
js file-template-editor.js /js/file-template-editor/
js json-template-editor.js /js/file-template-editor/

File Viewer

In-browser PDF, CSV, and image viewers with toolbar.

18

Wizard Form

Multi-step modal form wizard with progress bar and lifecycle callbacks.

1
js wizard-form.min.js /js/wizard-form/

Dynamic form field repeater for add/remove row interactions.

10

Sequential batch task runner with progress callbacks.

Hierarchical tree navigation component.

CSV data viewer rendered as an interactive table.

Chunk

Array chunking utility for processing large datasets in slices.

2

Toast notification library with Voyadores theme and animation support.

WYSIWYG rich text editor with Bootstrap 5 and Voyadores theme. Language packs under js/summernote/lang/.

Highcharts

Interactive charting library. Modules and themes available under js/highcharts/.

17
